# zabbix_host (Resource)

Manages a Zabbix host.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "zabbix_host_group" "linux" {
  name = "Linux servers"
}

resource "zabbix_host" "web_server" {
  host           = "web-srv-01"
  name           = "Web Server 01"
  description    = "Primary web server"
  status         = "enabled"
  host_group_ids = [zabbix_host_group.linux.id]

  tags = [
    { name = "env", value = "production" },
    { name = "role", value = "web" },
  ]

  inventory_mode = "manual"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host` (String) Technical name of the host. Must be unique within Zabbix.
- `host_group_ids` (Set of String) Set of host group IDs the host belongs to. At least one is required. This set is authoritative — any groups not listed here are removed on apply.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the host.
- `inventory_mode` (String) Inventory population mode. One of: `disabled`, `manual`, `automatic`. Defaults to `disabled`.
- `name` (String) Visible display name of the host. Defaults to the technical name if not set.
- `proxy_id` (String) ID of the proxy that monitors the host. Set to `0` for no proxy.
- `status` (String) Monitoring status of the host. One of: `enabled`, `disabled`. Defaults to `enabled`.
- `tags` (Attributes Set) Set of tags to attach to the host. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the host.

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Required:

- `name` (String) Tag name.

Optional:

- `value` (String) Tag value. Defaults to `""`.
